emails.subject: New Book
emails.body: New Book Susan, The NG-PRICE-PRC book will now be calculated using two post ids. Therefore, we need an additional RisktRAC book id for the Price book so that we can capture both post ids. Please set up an NG-PRICE2-PRC book with the same attributes as the NG-PRICE-PRC book. The new books needs to be added to the AGG-GAS, AGG-GASIII and AGG-GASIV portfolios. In AGGIII and IV, please set up a separate portfolio for the new book. The new portfolio should be named M_Maggi. If you have any questions, give me a call. Thanks, Robin

emails.body: Re: New Book Robin the NG-PRICE2-PRC book is now set up in RisktRAC and has been placed in the respective portfolios. Please contact me if you have any questions. Thank you, Susan x3-1462 Robin Rodrigue 02/21/2001 09:13 AM
